creator: buganini@gmail.com
text:
A collection of Khmer OS TrueType fonts. The package contains:
- KhmerOS
- KhmerOS Battambang
- KhmerOS Bokor
- KhmerOS Content
- KhmerOS Fasthand
- KhmerOS Freehand
- KhmerOS Metalchrieng
- KhmerOS Muol
- KhmerOS Muollight
- KhmerOS Muolpali
- KhmerOS Siemreap
- KhmerOS Sys

WWW: http://sourceforge.net/projects/khmer/

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
